game_difficulty.default_description: Here you can choose the difficulty of the game. The different options will effect things such as event frequency and difficulty. The amount of generated factions and how powerful or hostile these factions will be.
game_difficulty.Timid:
This options is for those that prefer building and exploration and offers a more laid back experience.
Events will be less hostile and less frequent. Factions will likely be more friend than foe.
game_difficulty.Normal:
Choosing this option ensures the game is played how the designer intended the game to be played. Events will be random offering a higher replay value.
Things could either go really well or horribly wrong.
Faction alignment is random.
game_difficulty.Brutal:
Only choose this option if you want a real challenge, this is only advised for more experienced players.
Events will be more hostile and will occur much more frequently. Pawns will require more micro management and are more likely to become ill or depressed.
Factions will be more foe than friend.

restart_game_prompt: You must restart the game in order for the adjusted mods to be loaded correctly.
game_over_reason_one:
All your pawns are dead and there is no one to run your ship.
You can either choose to leave and exit back to the main menu, or you can continue in the hope someone will rescue your ship and allow you to continue.
game_over_Reason_two: Your ship has been blown to pieces and any survivors will slowly but surely die, floating within the cold, dark vastness of space until they run out of any air they may have left.
nowhere_to_drink: There is no where to drink from
nowhere_to_eat: There is no where to eat from
ship_arrived: The {ship_name} is now in comms range
en_flag_for_deconstruction:
This item is flagged for deconstruction.

You can cancel this by clicking here.
rm_max_pressure:
The maximum pressure this room can hold.

A leak in your hull will cause a loss
of this pressure.

Ideal Pressure: 100%
rm_oxygen_pressure:
The current oxygen pressure in this room.

Ideal Pressure: 20%
rm_carbon_dioxide_pressure:
The current carbon dioxide pressure in this room.

Ideal Pressure: 0%
rm_hazardous_gas_pressure:
The current amount of hazardous gas in this room.

Ideal Pressure: 0%
rm_inert_gas_pressure:
The current amount of inert gasses in this room.

Ideal Pressure: 80%
pm_health:
How much health this creature has.
Once it reaches zero this creature will die.
mm_morale:
Mood reflects this creatures frame of mind.

If this gets too low then this creature may decide
to ignore commands or far worse.
mm_hunger:
Hunger relates to the amount of solids this creature
has consumed recently.

Once this reaches zero the creature will start
to loose health and eventually die.
mm_thirst:
Thirst relates to the amount of fluids this creature
has consumed recently.

Once this reaches zero the creature will start
to loose health and eventually die.
mm_energy:
Energy relates to the amount of energy this creature
can exert before becoming exhausted.

Sleeping will increase energy.
systems_alarm_button: Sound the alarm. Red Alert: Everyone get back to the ship!
systems_power_button: Turn all the ships power on or off.
ship_cannot_afford_this: This ship cannot afford to buy this!
player_not_enough_credits: You do not have enough credits to buy this!
player_not_enough_cargo_space: You do not have cargo space to buy this!
pawn_initiated_trade: {pawn_name} has initiated trade with a social skill of {skill_level}
